---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new detection pattern, output format, or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like added.

## Motivation

Explain the problem this feature solves. What are you trying to do that PhiScan
currently cannot do?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. Include example CLI usage, configuration,
or output if applicable.

```bash
# Example
phi-scan scan . --new-flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered and why you prefer the
proposed solution.

## Compliance context

If this request is related to a specific compliance requirement (HIPAA, GDPR, 42 CFR
Part 2, state privacy law), please describe the requirement:

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references to standards documents here.
